#SyncMaster #AfricanComposers #SyncLicensing #MusicSupervisor #AfricanMusic

slides.headline: A production company sent us a brief on Monday morning.
By Wednesday afternoon, they had 5 cleared, brief-matched tracks.
Here's what you need to know:
slides.lede: All from African composers. · Here's how we did it in 48 hours ↓
list_items: Here's how we did it in 48 hours ↓

slides.headline: Here's what you need to know:
slides.lede: THE BRIEF: · Duration: 60–90 seconds · Instrumentation: Afrofusion, organic elements · Mood: Tense, building, cinematic · We didn't scramble. We searched.

slides.headline: Here's what you need to know:
slides.lede: Because the catalogue was built before the brief arrived: · Composers vetted in advance · Tracks tagged by mood, BPM, key, instrumentation · Rights confirmed for every track in the system
list_items: Because the catalogue was built before the brief arrived:
Tracks tagged by mood, BPM, key, instrumentation
Rights confirmed for every track in the system

slides.headline: Result: 5 tracks delivered in 24 hours. All cleared. All brief-matched.

slides.headline: Speed is trust in sync. You earn it by doing the work before the brief arrives.
Open briefs. Every Tuesday.
slides.lede: Composers: apply once, get matched for life. Supervisors: shortlist in 48h.
